title: Clean UI
description: Replaces Minecraft's UI Elements with clean and modernized ones.
body:
Replaces some of Minecraft's UI Elements with clean and modernized ones.

Preview:
![Preview Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32fab91e0a85dd9f1c6a1559616353518cd65f29.jpeg)
![Preview Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7b310b2ba2daa5ddd9b9af2cb439ce916d10220.png)
Backgrounds remain unchanged, so that texture packs can still modify them.
